use_cases: Primary call-to-action triggers in any UI context
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and interfaces
Destructive action buttons with distinct visual treatment
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with class-variance-authority supporting multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Features Radix UI Slot for composition, focus-visible accessibility states, and standard hover/disabled interactions. Designed as a foundational UI building block for any design system.
